name: IdsEdwProvIpaRelshpDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS ( SELECT D.PROV_IPA_RELSHP_SK, D.PROV_ID, D.PROV_IPA_PROV_ID, D.EFF_DT_SK, D.PROV_SK, D.PROV_IPA_PROV_SK, D.PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_RSN_CD_SK, D.TERM_DT_SK, COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS LKP_TRGT_CD, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS LKP_TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_IPA_RELSHP D LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON D.PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_RSN_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK ), cte2 AS ( SELECT PROV_IPA_RELSHP_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ID, PROV_IPA_PROV_ID, EFF_DT_SK AS PROV_IPA_RELSHP_EFF_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PROV_SK, PROV_IPA_PROV_SK, TERM_DT_SK AS PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_DT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(LKP_TRGT_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE LKP_TRGT_CD END AS PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_RSN_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(LKP_TRGT_CD_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE LKP_TRGT_CD_NM END AS PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_RSN_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_RSN_CD_SK FROM cte1 ) SELECT PROV_IPA_RELSHP_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ID, PROV_IPA_PROV_ID, PROV_IPA_RELSHP_EFF_DT_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PROV_SK, PROV_IPA_PROV_SK, PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_DT_SK, PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_RSN_CD, PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_RSN_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, PROV_IPA_RELSHP_TERM_RSN_CD_SK FROM cte2

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

INPUTS:
	IDS - PROV_IPA_RELSHP
  
HASH FILES:
                hf_cdma_codes         - CDMA code table - resolve code lookups

                  TRIM all the fields that are extracted or used in lookups
                           
PROCESSING:
                  IDS - read from source, lookup all code SK values and get the natural codes

ProvIpaRelshpTermRsnCdSk
Write PROV_IPA_RELSHP Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvIpaRelshpDLoad.

Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Job Name: IdsEdwProvIpaRelshpDExtr
